description_long: This is a futuristic, tactical shotgun with a predominantly white and black color scheme accented by orange and brown geometric patterns. The body is constructed with a sleek, angular design, featuring a robust barrel with multiple venting holes along the top and a long, linear form. The stock is integrated into the rear with a thumbhole grip, providing ergonomic handling, and the trigger guard is large and angular, likely to accommodate gloved hands. The shotgun has a visible pump mechanism beneath the barrel, suggesting a pump-action operation, and the fore-end is reinforced with textured panels for improved grip. The overall finish is smooth with some matte and glossy elements, and the weapon appears to be made primarily of metal with some polymer components. This shotgun is designed for urban tactical scenarios, combining modern aesthetics with practical features for close-quarters use.
description: A sleek, futuristic pump-action shotgun with a white, black, and orange color scheme, featuring a thumbhole stock and angular, ergonomic design. The weapon has a long, vented barrel and a robust, textured fore-end for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the thumbhole stock, vented barrel, and orange geometric accents.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the venting holes along the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the same angular design, with visible pump mechanism and detailed grip textures.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's thumbhole design and the overall symmetry of the shotgun's body.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with venting holes along the top and a long, linear profile
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, angular trigger guard with a squared shape and reinforced lower edge
